evals.prompt: Refresh my AGENTS.md — capture what we learned this session and clean things up. During this session we discovered that `npm run test:unit` is much faster than `npm test` for iterating, that the API client in src/api/ expects a BASE_URL env var (not documented anywhere), and that the ESLint config ignores the generated/ folder. The current AGENTS.md is getting long and has some frontend-specific rules mixed in with backend stuff.
evals.expected_output: Runs all three phases: discovers current AGENTS.md state, drafts new learnings targeting appropriate files, proposes structural reorganization since the root file is long with mixed scopes, and presents a combined preview for approval.

assertions.text: All three session learnings are present in output files (test:unit, BASE_URL, ESLint ignores generated/)
Content is split into multiple files rather than keeping everything in one file
Root AGENTS.md is under 120 lines with only essential project-wide guidance
Frontend and backend rules are separated, not mixed in root
Response follows structured format with clearly labeled sections

evals.prompt: Quick AGENTS.md update — we found out that running `cargo clippy --all-targets` before pushing catches most CI failures, and that the integration tests need Docker running. Don't need a big reorg, just add the learnings.
evals.expected_output: Discovers current state, drafts concise learnings, detects refactor not needed, presents additions for approval.

assertions.text: Updated AGENTS.md includes cargo clippy --all-targets guidance
Updated AGENTS.md includes Docker requirement for integration tests
File structure NOT reorganized — only existing AGENTS.md updated
Existing content preserved, not removed or substantially rewritten
New additions are concise one-liners, not verbose paragraphs

evals.prompt: My AGENTS.md files are a mess — there's a 200-line root file with everything jammed in, plus two subdirectory AGENTS files that duplicate half the root content. Please reorganize them. I don't think there are specific session learnings to capture, just clean up what's there.
evals.expected_output: Full refactor: discovers structural problems, extracts root essentials, groups/splits content, flags deletion candidates.

assertions.text: Root AGENTS.md significantly shorter than original, ideally under 120 lines
Specialized content moved into topic-specific files
Duplicate content between root and subdirectory files eliminated
No substantial guidance lost in reorganization
Response identifies deletion candidates with reasons
